data.body:
A "Jesus complex" (or Messiah complex) in mental institutes refers to a subtype of grandiose delusions where patients hold an unshakeable belief that they are Jesus Christ or a messianic savior sent to save humanity. 
It is a relatively common phenomenon in psychiatric wards...
